sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES Gradius

special_mechanics.name: Vic Viper Spacecraft
special_mechanics.description: Player controls trans-dimensional spaceship with horizontal movement. Ship starts relatively slow with weak gun, gains capabilities via power-up system.

special_mechanics.name: Power-Up System
special_mechanics.description: Single power-up item advances menu selection. Player presses power-up button to activate highlighted effect, returning menu to initial state. No jump/platformer mechanics; pure horizontal shooter.

special_mechanics.name: Option Satellites
special_mechanics.description: Satellite weapons with tested movement patterns. Development process tested over 20 different movement patterns, whittled down through elimination.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Gradius is a horizontal scrolling shooter, not a platformer. No documented jump physics, gravity, or acceleration values in available sources. Sources contain ROM mapping, regional differences, development history, and gameplay mechanics but no precise movement physics parameters.
